scripts.dev: concurrently -n client,server -c blue,green "npm run dev -w @dc2d/client" "npm run dev -w @dc2d/game-server"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @dc2d/game-server && npm run build -w @dc2d/client
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @dc2d/engine && npm run typecheck -w @dc2d/content && npm run typecheck -w @dc2d/game-server && npm run typecheck -w @dc2d/client
